findings.finding: The earlier FU01D attempt could not count rows because copied cleanroom inputs did not include executable generic protection/charm/ward route connectors.
findings.resolution: Superseded by source refresh 53642cf0b1bc98f4426b6081fe37c98a960939fc, which copied the focused route connectors. The refreshed artifacts now count only rows with reducer-entrypoint route replay evidence against those connectors.

rounds.summary: Reviewed refreshed copied QNT route connectors, selected drivers, RAW/domain language for Animal Friendship, Protection from Evil and Good, Sanctuary, Charmed, concentration, target, and area-effect terminology. The implemented replay uses generic subject, fill, owner, and hole shape; no production authored-identity dispatch is present.

Convergence pass after artifact refresh: accepted FU01D rows are backed by target replay evidence observed through reducer entrypoints; checked state fields are recorded in the state-owner manifest; report rows cite RUN_LEDGER evidence refs.
